home.quickOverview: Gates of Olympus is one of Pragmatic Play's most popular slots. The game uses 6 reels with cluster pays: symbols tumble in cascades, and multipliers up to 500x accumulate and apply to wins. RTP 96.5% and high volatility mean less frequent but larger payouts. The bonus round awards 15 free spins when 4 or more scatters land; in the bonus, multipliers do not reset between spins. In our full guide you will find an RTP and volatility breakdown, bankroll management strategy, how multipliers work, and tips for demo play. We recommend learning the rules and trying the demo without registration first, then playing for real with a fixed bet of 1–2% of your bankroll.
